title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Walker Chandiok - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
